title: SSF & Payroll basics
content:
SSF: employer/employee contributions on basic salary — verify current rates with SSF Nepal/CA. EPF/CIT for some employers.
Roman: SSF kateko, sanchayakosh, karmachari ko SSF.
AI records salary and flags TDS/SSF verification — do not guess rates.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)
